item.title: Enriching the Semantics of Information Flow Tracking with Source-Level Memory Allocation Event Logging

item.title: Demystify the Fuzzing Methods: A Comprehensive Survey
item.description:
Sanoop Mallissery and Yu-Sung Wu. "Demystify the Fuzzing Methods: A Comprehensive Survey." ACM Computing Surveys, vol. 56, no. 3, article 71, March 2024, pp. 1–38. https://doi.org/10.1145/3623375.
BibTeX
@article{10.1145/3623375,

  numpages = {38},
  keywords = {vulnerability discovery, code inspection, fuzzing, automated testing}
}
